en: When you get bit by a snake, you're supposed to suck the poison out.
That's what I had to do. Suck all the poison out of my life.
I started with Regina, who was living proof that the more people are scared of you, the more flowers you get.
Then there was Miss Norbury, who was living proof that no good deed goes unpunished.
Oh, hi. Did you want to buy some drugs? I'm just done with my quiz.
Wait. I'll grade it right now.
I gotta say, watching the police search my house really was the cherry on top of a fantastic year.
ko: 경찰이 내 집을 수색하는 걸 보는 건 정말 환상적인 한 해의 정점이었어.

en: How much trouble did you get in for telling the truth? A lot.
Well, you didn't write that whole book yourself. Did you tell Mr. Duvall who else did it?
ko: 그 책을 혼자 쓴 건 아니잖아. 두발 선생님께 말했어?
